subjects.name: English Language (Prelims & Mains)
subjects.analysis: Reading comprehension is dominant. Focus on contextual vocabulary and grammar application.

subjects.name: Numerical Ability (Prelims)
subjects.analysis: Speed and accuracy in arithmetic are key to clearing the Prelims cutoff.

subjects.name: Reasoning Ability (Prelims)
subjects.analysis: Puzzle and seating arrangement heavy. Efficiency in logical puzzles is mandatory.

subjects.name: General & Financial Awareness (Mains)
subjects.analysis: Banking awareness heavy. This section is the primary score booster for final merit.

subjects.name: Reasoning Ability & Computer Aptitude (Mains)
subjects.analysis: High-level complex puzzles and machine input-output are tested here.

subjects.name: Quantitative Aptitude (Mains)
subjects.analysis: Data Interpretation (DI) based arithmetic is the core focus of the Mains paper.

mentorship_data.title: Prelims Strategy
mentorship_data.content: Focus on Puzzles and DI for the cutoff. Speed and accuracy must be balanced as there are sectional timings.

mentorship_data.title: Mains Strategy
mentorship_data.content: GA preparation for the last 6 months is mandatory. Focus on the Banking and Finance sub-sectors deeply.

mentorship_data.title: Mock Plan
mentorship_data.content: Attempt 20 prelims and 15 mains full-length mocks to master the sectional time pressure.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Is there an interview for SBI Clerk?
frequently_asked_questions.a: No, there is no interview for the Junior Associate (Clerk) post.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Are Prelims marks added to the final merit?
frequently_asked_questions.a: No, Prelims is qualifying; only Mains marks are considered for the final merit list.
There is a 1/4th (0.25) negative marking for each wrong answer in both phases.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Is the Language Proficiency Test (LPT) mandatory?
frequently_asked_questions.a: Yes, if you haven't studied the local language in 10th/12th, you must qualify the LPT.

frequently_asked_questions.q: Which section is most important for Mains?
frequently_asked_questions.a: General Awareness is highly scoring and carries 50 marks, making it critical for selection.
